My Contribution

How do you drive $1B+ in digital revenue inside an $800B industry that had almost no digital playbook? As the architect of the digital marketing system, I built the infrastructure, scaled the engine, and delivered measurable impact — three chapters, three years, one relentless approach to growth.

03

RFM Segmentation

Precision marketing requires precision targeting. I designed QXO's segmentation framework around three leading indicators of customer value and churn risk — moving the business from mass messaging to individualized, ROI-based activation.

R
Recency
How recently did they purchase?
Strong predictor of churn risk
Near-term reorder likelihood
Days since last transaction
F
Frequency
How often do they purchase?
Indicates habitual purchasing
Forecasts lifetime value
Identifies "sticky" accounts
M
Monetary
How much do they spend?
Total revenue & gross margin
Average order value
Annual wallet share
Customer Segments → Lifecycle Stages
👑
Top Performers
High recency, frequency, and spend. Your highest-value accounts — protect and grow.
Value Score: 88%
🔁
Core Accounts
Consistent purchasers with reliable frequency. Backbone of predictable revenue.
Value Score: 74%
🚀
Promising
Recent buyers with growing frequency. On the path to loyalty — invest now.
Value Score: 61%
⚠️
Needs Attention
Above-average historically but declining engagement signals emerging risk.
Value Score: 46%
🔴
At-Risk
Previously valuable but showing strong churn signals. Re-engagement urgency high.
Value Score: 29%
💤
Churned
Fully lapsed. Targeted win-back or removal from active spend — protect budget efficiency.
Value Score: 11%
Segmentation Inputs
📊 Purchase recency, frequency, monetary value
🎯 Behavioral engagement signals
📈 Customer lifetime value modeling
🏪 Customer loyalty & wallet share
→
Precision Activation
Mass marketing → Precision marketing
Uniform spend → ROI-based allocation
Generic messaging → 1:1 personalization
Reactive campaigns → Predictive lifecycle
04

Career Timeline

2021 — Present CURRENT
QXO · Brad Jacobs Company
Director – Digital Marketing & Marketing Operations · Herndon, VA

Built QXO's entire digital marketing infrastructure from zero inside a $800B industry. Architected the funnel, CDP, segmentation engine, Growth Lab, and attribution system — then scaled it to $1.25B in digital revenue while influencing $2.5B in branch sales. Stood on the NYSE floor during the Beacon Building Products acquisition.

  • Built complete marketing funnel and lifecycle tracking system from scratch
  • Deployed a sophisticated unified marketing intelligence platform driving predictive targeting, lifecycle automation, and the framework for next-best-action
  • Founded the Growth Lab — cross-functional innovation think tank across 6 departments
  • Designed AI segmentation framework: RFM analysis, CLV modeling, and behavioral signals synthesized across several customer tiers
  • Operated within a zero-based budgeting framework — connecting every dollar to measurable incremental revenue and holding spend accountable to performance
  • Invited to NYSE as part of QXO leadership during Beacon Building Products acquisition
Digital Revenue Scaled$750M→$1.25B
Offline Sales Influenced$2.5B
Leads / Quarter30,000
New Customers / Qtr1,500
Marketing Budget$7M
Team Size11 People
2018 — 2021
CIC Plus (now Equifax)
Head of Digital Marketing

Led all digital marketing strategy, execution, and performance reporting across a 3.5-year tenure — driving compounding funnel improvements, a complete brand overhaul, and a marketing intelligence infrastructure built to scale.

  • Directed a comprehensive brand refresh — authored a 40-page brand guideline covering logo usage, color palette, typography, tone of voice, illustration, and photography standards
  • Designed and implemented a custom KPI dashboard in Salesforce Einstein Analytics tracking MQLs, SQLs, opportunities, and closed won/lost deals in real time
  • Built automated workflows optimizing spend across paid search, social, email, newsletters, and event marketing — driving 392% average MQL growth over three years
  • Developed integrated marketing automation infrastructure and collaborated with agency partner Brafton to drive content marketing strategy and execution at scale
  • Owned SEO and SEM strategy end-to-end — link-building, keyword optimization, retargeting — while partnering closely with sales to align pipeline generation with revenue goals
MQL Growth+392%
SQL Growth+150%
Marketing-Influenced Deals+178%
Team Size4 People
2017 — 2018
CCC Information Services
Senior Marketing Analyst

Elevated paid media performance and built the marketing technology foundation — delivering transformative ROI within months while scaling inbound pipeline generation.

  • Increased paid search ROI by 800% within three months through strategic campaign restructuring and bid optimization
  • Implemented and managed Pardot marketing automation, integrating it with Salesforce CRM to streamline lead handoff and attribution
  • Developed and maintained the marketing technology stack, managing third-party integrations across Terminus, AdWords, Calendly, Moz, and more
  • Developed and executed paid and organic social strategy while partnering with sales leadership on email campaigns and inbound lead generation initiatives
Paid Search ROI+800%
Tenure1 yr 4 mos
MarTech Integrations4+ Platforms

WorkForce Software
Digital Marketing Analyst (Global)

Drove global digital marketing growth across paid and organic channels. Grew lead volume massively while cutting acquisition costs simultaneously.

06

06

Advisory Clients

Alongside my full-time role, I've taken on select advisory engagements with leading retail brands navigating the same challenges I've solved at scale — building the analytical infrastructure and strategic frameworks needed to move from mass marketing to precision customer activation. The work spans customer analytics modernization, AI-driven segmentation, and lifecycle strategy development.

  • Customer Lifetime Value Modeling
